overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring the Royal Palace of Alexandria at night. The character walks through various connected zones including a fountain courtyard, a grand ceremonial avenue lined with statues and fire braziers, a columned palace gate, an interior corridor, and finally emerges into a garden area. The scene features classical Greco-Roman architecture with stone columns, mosaic floors, and torch lighting against a dark blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain, surveying the courtyard area

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with multiple tiers
geometric patterned stone tile flooring in black and white
large wooden entrance door with stone frame illuminated by warm light
burning torches mounted on the courtyard walls
stone seating around the fountain perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character explores a palace courtyard at night, circling a large central stone fountain. The area features geometric mosaic flooring, stone benches, and warm torchlight illuminating the wooden entrance doors ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue with statues and fire braziers

events.description: exits the courtyard into a wide ceremonial avenue lined with statues

agents.ego_description: walking straight down the grand avenue toward the palace entrance

notable_agents.action: guard in red tunic walking ahead toward the palace

entered.detail: tall white marble statues atop stone pillars flanking the avenue
large burning braziers on stone pillars providing warm orange light
intricate geometric pavement pattern in black and white stone
grand palace entrance with triangular pediment and columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a grand ceremonial avenue flanked by tall marble statues on pillars and burning fire braziers. The palace facade looms ahead at the end of the mosaic-paved path, while a guard walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace entrance gate with columns and hanging drapes

events.description: approaching and entering the covered palace gate area
passing under the gate into the shadowed interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the palace gate between large stone columns

entered.detail: monumental stone gateway with triangular pediment and hanging white drapes
tall fluted stone columns supporting the gate structure
white fabric curtains hanging between the gate columns
stone sphinx statue flanking the entrance pathway
decorative metal fence panels with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the palace gate, passing between massive stone columns and white hanging drapes. Sphinx statues flank the entrance as the character moves from the open avenue into the sheltered gate area, transitioning into shadow.

events.description: entering the long columned corridor extending through the palace

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered colonnade with rows of stone pillars

entered.detail: tall stone pillars forming a covered walkway with repeating pattern
red and white patterned stone flooring in the covered passage
red glowing lanterns suspended from the corridor ceiling
garden areas visible through openings in the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long covered colonnade lined with tall stone columns and illuminated by hanging red lanterns. The corridor features patterned mosaic flooring and offers glimpses of side gardens through openings in the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace gardens with trees and pavilion

events.description: exiting the corridor into the open palace gardens

agents.ego_description: walking along garden paths toward a pavilion structure

entered.detail: mature leafy trees lining the garden pathways
winding dirt and stone path through the landscaped garden
classical pavilion structure with columns at the garden center
trimmed hedge rows and flowering plants along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into open palace gardens with mature trees, trimmed hedges, and flowering plants. A classical pavilion stands at the center of the garden as the character walks along the winding paths under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the Royal Palace of Alexandria, transitioning from an open torchlit courtyard into the sheltered depths of the palace before emerging into a serene night garden. It begins by circling a large stone fountain atop geometric mosaic floors, moving toward wooden entrance doors illuminated by warm light. As the camera advances, the scene opens into a grand ceremonial avenue flanked by marble statues and burning braziers, following a guard toward the looming palace facade. The movement then shifts from the open air into the shadows of the palace gate, passing between massive columns and white drapes before entering a long colonnade lined with red lanterns and patterned flooring. Finally, the camera emerges from the covered corridor into the open palace gardens, winding past trimmed hedges and flowering plants toward a central classical pavilion under the dark night sky.
